lifecycle_status_requires_workflow: This operation requires the booking workflow service
start_time_required_for_non_draft: Start time is required for non-draft bookings
cannot_delete_terminal: Cannot delete a booking in a terminal state
cannot_delete_tasks_started: Cannot delete a booking after tasks have started
refund_only_confirmed_or_completed: Refunds are only allowed for confirmed or completed bookings

reject_draft_only: Only DRAFT bookings can be rejected
